notes: Ground-truth exogenous events for EE meteo pilot. Soviet collapse creates extreme outliers pre-1995; event windows respect this structural break.

events.label: Soviet Union collapse — Estonian independence restored
events.source: EE declared independence August 1991; industrial collapse 1991-1993

expected.C: negative or zero — symbolic disruption, no accumulation

events.falsification_prediction: O collapse not reproduced by placebo shift to 1996 or 2001

events.label: Estonia EU accession
events.source: EE joined EU May 2004; adoption of EU regulatory framework

expected.R: increase — R&D framework harmonised with EU

events.falsification_prediction: I/S increase not observed in placebo 1997-2001

events.label: Extreme heat wave summer 2010
events.source: Eastern European heat wave 2010; energy demand spike
events.falsification_prediction: Σ spike absent in negative control 2005-2008

events.label: COVID-19 pandemic
events.source: EE GDP -2.9% 2020; smaller impact than EU average due to digital economy

expected.C: minor disruption; fast recovery expected given EE digital resilience
